subject: Swanna, a white swan-like bird creature with long graceful neck and spread wings, depicted mid-dance or mid-flight
description: A white swan creature is shown in a graceful, sweeping pose with wings spread wide. The neck is long and curved elegantly, and the overall posture suggests a dance or slow glide rather than a power-dive. The coloring is predominantly white with blue-tinted feather highlights. The background suggests open sky and possibly water reflections below — pale blue and white tones creating an airy, open-space feel. The mood is peaceful and sublime, echoing the flavor text about Swanna dancing at dusk. The light appears soft and diffuse, consistent with dusk or overcast daylight.
foreground: White swan creature with wings spread, long curved neck, graceful dancing posture
background: Open sky, pale blue tones, hints of water reflection below
emotion: Graceful, serene — open wingspan and curved neck suggest confidence and elegance rather than tension
